message:
fix(clippy): resolve needless_borrows and or_fun_call warnings in policy/quarantine

- Remove unnecessary & on format!() args passed to impl Into<String> params
- Replace ok_or() with ok_or_else() for lazy error construction in quarantine registry
- 42/42 quarantine-related tests pass
